calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:35am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, nothing reported, D525
Cause called for small claims appeal. Appellant, Ralph Doore appears as pro per; respondent, Lawrence Smyle appears as pro per. Parties, previously sworn, respoctively present their case in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
Respondent, Lawrence Smyle requests recess for an hour to go back for his evidence for the case.

9:38am: Court granted recess until 10:30am
10:30am: Court resume, all parties present.
EXHR (A) Itemized invoice of damages, 1 photo, & 2 letters
EXHR (B) letters/affidavit from witnesses (Gregory & David)
EXHA (1) e-mails and T-Mobil phone bills from A through M (C is omitted)
EXHA (2) E-mails from O though S

11:15am
Matter is submitted. Newly marked evidence is retained.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Continued To Sep-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES:
Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles. Clerk: B.Paredes, Not reported. (525)

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appearance by Respondent/Plaintiff and Appellant/defendant in Pro Per.

The court heard argument re: continuance requested by Defendant Ralph Doore -continuance -Granted.

Matter ordered continued to September 5, 2013 @ 9:00 am in Dept 525.
with not further continuances.
